name: edhoc
description: EDHOC (RFC 9528) Suite 0 PRK derivation and OSCORE export interop vectors between Rust lichen-oscore and Python reference. PRK_*, TH_*, master_secret, master_salt must match byte-for-byte.

vectors.name: rfc9529_trace_prk_export
vectors.description: Derived from RFC 9529 test vector trace adjusted for LICHEN Suite 0. Verifies PRK and OSCORE outputs.
